failureBreakdown.note: Re-run 2026-06-08 (web-llm 0.2.84/WebGPU, Web Worker engine, raw output preserved). Of 214 relevant cases, 146 trapped with RuntimeError: unreachable BEFORE generating any token — the k=8 tool-declaration prompt (~2.0-3.4k chars, ~700-900 tok) overflows this community build's 512-token sliding-window KV cache during prefill (paged_kv_cache.cc: 'KV cache is full'). The remaining 68 RAN but emitted degenerate output (empty {}, repeated tokens, hex noise, duplicate-key/hallucinated names); 0 were a coherent tool selection. So the 0/N is dominated by a runtime/context-window limit (cannot process the prompt), NOT by the model routing to wrong tools.
